task_completion.description: Navigate to the patient record or lab entry screen for Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED interface should display 'Maria Santos' as the active patient context or within the lab test entry form.

task_completion.description: Enter the test date and accession ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field should contain '2025-02-15' and the accession/ID field should contain 'ACC-88492-LP'.

task_completion.description: Enter the Total Cholesterol and Triglycerides results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lab results form should show '195' entered for Total Cholesterol and '120' entered for Triglycerides.

task_completion.description: Enter the HDL and LDL results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lab results form should show '45' entered for HDL and '126' entered for LDL.

task_completion.description: Enter the required comment for the lipid profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The comments or notes field should contain the exact text: 'Normal lipid profile. Continue current diet.'
A success message indicating the record was saved, or a view of the finalized/saved lab record in the FreeMED interface.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeMED graphical user interface to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the FreeMED web application, not a terminal window executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual FreeMED application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar and page layout should correspond to the FreeMED EMR system, not a local text editor or a mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible showing MySQL/MariaDB prompts or SQL INSERT statements being executed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Maria Santos. Accession Number: ACC-88492-LP. Test Date: 2025-02-15. Lab Results - Total Cholesterol: 195, Triglycerides: 120, HDL: 45, LDL: 126. Comment: 'Normal lipid profile. Continue current diet.'
